query: We're scaffolding a new public-facing Singapore government service. What does every gov.sg site need in place before we start building features?
Add the Official Government Banner — the "A Singapore Government Agency Website" masthead — to the top of every page of our agency site.
Register our new service on WOGAA and wire up the tracking code and the Sentiments feedback widget.
Build the official government footer with all the mandatory links, including the Report Vulnerability link, for our agency website.
Set up our .gov.sg domain and the Singapore Government Design System for a new digital service.
Review our existing agency website for DSS shell compliance — banner, footer, WOGAA, domain, and the Level 0 Trust & Legitimacy controls.
What are the Baseline Design and Performance & Reliability controls we need to satisfy for a new gov.sg service, and which are mandatory?
We're launching a mobile app for our agency. What are the app-store distribution and IP-ownership shell requirements under the Digital Service Standards?
Scaffold the base layout for our new agency web service with the masthead, SGDS setup, and the standard footer wired in.
Our new gov service is missing the government masthead and isn't registered on WOGAA. Get the mandatory shell in place.
Audit our government form for WCAG 2.2 AA — colour contrast, keyboard navigation, and screen-reader labels.
Implement the Singpass login and Myinfo pre-fill on our citizen service's sign-in page.
Set up business-user login with Corppass for the companies that transact on our portal.
Which System Security Plan and DSS profile apply to our new service, and what control baseline results?
Configure the Content-Security-Policy and HSTS security headers for our government web app.
Set up branch protection, secret scanning, and SAST in the CI pipeline for our agency repo.
Wire up central logging, service-health SLOs, and detection alerting for our agency system.
Set up a landing page with a nav bar and a footer for my startup's marketing site.
Add SSO and MFA for our internal staff who administer the service.
Pin our cloud resources to the Singapore region and configure encryption at rest for government data.
